span.p:
On-device behavioural biometrics
→ SIGNED, device-attested assertion only

div.style: color: rgb(255, 215, 219) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
verifier service (container)
OTP / WebAuthn / video-KYC
holds the Ed25519 PRIVATE key
— the ONLY minter of step-up assertions

div.style: color: rgb(220, 236, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ingress (container)
scoped API-key authN/Z
produces events keyed by identity_id
polls decisions · serves dashboard

div.style: color: rgb(220, 236, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Kafka — topic pramaan.events
keyed by identity_id (ordered + partitioned)

span.p:
TrustEngine: real model + deterministic blend
drift CUSUM · cold-start prior
capped recovery · resilience fail-closed/open
holds only the PUBLIC verify keys — cannot forge

div.style: color: rgb(220, 236, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Redis — per-identity state
trust / profile / device graph
per-key lock + version CAS

div.style: color: rgb(220, 236, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Postgres
audit chain: SHA-256 + HMAC
keyed PII vault: crypto-shred + tombstone
decisions sink
